name: Manor Echoes
acquisitionSource: Clear Psyche Deepdive: Whispers Behind the Fan
descriptionTemplate: Gain 1 Arithmetica and inflict [Exhaustion:Arg1] Temp. {STR▼} on all enemies. If Xu is in the team, also inflict 1 stack of {Spellbound} on all enemies.
lore:
The secluded manor holds too many secrets—of power, of obsession, of desire.
Of the glimpse the evil deity casts upon the mortal world, brimming with love both "delighted" and "twisted."
